name: RPlog_A_Fight_with_Kyyel
title: A Fight with Kyyel
summary: In an observation lounge aboard the NRSD Defiant, the brooding General Drax Rendolen is joined by the recovering ex-Jedi Jessalyn and her Corellian companion Kyyel Marrak, who come to discuss a mysterious intruder and the captured Emperor. The conversation turns grave when Drax reveals that the Sith Simon Sezirok is not dead after all -- his body was stolen by an abductor, almost certainly the exiled Mailyn Raines, whom Kyyel had freed on Tatooine. The ancient, blind Jedi Aurejin arrives and, learning of Kyyel's role, condemns him; when Kyyel refuses to fight, Aurejin strikes him, severs his sword and burns his thigh as a brutal lesson in Jedi discipline. Kyyel briefly loses control and ignites Jessalyn's lightsaber in a rage, but Aurejin overpowers and disarms him, then relents. The duel ends with Kyyel humiliated and silent, Jessalyn disillusioned and refusing to accept the cruelty of the Order, and Aurejin departing with her, promising to find a way to restore her connection to the Force.
